title: Yoshiki: Under the Sky
overview: YOSHIKI produced and collaborated with artists from various countries such as the United States, Europe, China, and Japan with songs he arranged himself. "Yoshiki Under the Sky" will be released ahead of the world in Japan on Friday September 8th.  This project started with YOSHIKI's message to the whole world that we can overcome any difficulties, even in a time of global crisis.
